headline: Chipotle Stock: Down More Than 40% From Its 52-Week High, Is It Time to Buy?
summary: The burrito chain's recent comparable restaurant sales declines suggest its struggles could go beyond just a tough macroeconomic environment.

headline: Jim Cramer on Chipotle Mexican Grill: “I Want to Buy Some Here, Not Sell Some”

headline: A Look At Chipotle Mexican Grill’s (CMG) Valuation After The Restaurant Sell Off Sparked By The Weak U.S. Jobs Report
summary: A weaker U.S. jobs report, including roughly 30,000 restaurant and bar job losses, hit discretionary spending expectations and sparked an industry-wide sell-off that pulled Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) lower alongside many dining peers. See our latest analysis for Chipotle Mexican Grill. Beyond the macro driven pullback, Chipotle’s 1 day share price return of a 4.56% decline adds to a 10.21% decline over 30 days. Its 1 year total shareholder return of a 29.02% decline contrasts with a 12.91%...
